nasb.text: “The east side, from between Hauran, Damascus, Gilead and the land of Israel, shall be the Jordan; from the north border to the eastern sea you shall measure. This is the east side.

esv.text: “On the east side, the boundary shall run between Hauran and Damascus; along the Jordan between Gilead and the land of Israel; to the eastern sea and as far as Tamar. This shall be the east side.

cnv.text: 東面的地界是在浩蘭和大馬士革之間，基列和以色列地之間的約旦河。你們要從北面的地界量到東海，這是東面的地界。

ccb.text: “东界是从北界南下经浩兰、大马士革、沿着基列和以色列中间的约旦河为界，一直伸展到东部的海。
